badges.name: Blog Author - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Blog Author badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community by writing and publishing a blog post in 2026.

badges.name: CLI for Microsoft 365 - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: 2025 CLI for Microsoft 365 badge earners contributed to CLI for Microsoft 365 in the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: Community Content Author - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Community Content (Docs) Article Author badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community by writing and publishing Community Content Articles in 2026.

badges.name: Community Contributor - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Community Contributor badge earners contributed to one or more Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community initiatives by completing at least one contribution to a Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community initiative within the 2026 calendar year.

badges.name: Copilot Developer Camp - Agent Contributor - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: The Agent Contributor badge is awarded to developers who create sample solutions on top of Microsoft 365 Copilot and/or Work IQ and that share those samples with the community in the Community Sample Solution Gallery (https://aka.ms/community/samples).

badges.name: Copilot Developer Camp - Connection Champion - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: The Connection Champion badge is awarded to developers who excel in creating Connected Agents. It showcases the ability to design agents that collaborate, share context, and work together to deliver richer Copilot experiences.

badges.name: Copilot Developer Camp - Custom Engine Ranger - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: The Custom Engine Ranger badge is awarded to developers who master the creation of Custom Engine Agents using the Microsoft Agent Framework and the Microsoft 365 Agents SDK. It represents advanced skills in agent logic, orchestration, and integration with enterprise workloads.

badges.name: Copilot Developer Camp - Declarative Pioneer - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: The Declarative Pioneer badge recognizes developers who have demonstrated hands-on expertise in building Declarative Agents using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Connected Agents. This badge highlights a strong understanding of declarative patterns and modern Copilot extensibility.

badges.name: Copilot Developer Camp - Ideathon Winner - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: The Ideathon Winner badge is awarded to community members who attend in-person Copilot Dev Camp events and win the prize for the best agent idea or implementation during the event’s Ideathon.

badges.name: Copilot Developer Camp - Immersive Learner - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: The Immersive Learner badge is awarded to community members who attend in-person Copilot Dev Camp events and learned how to extend Microsoft 365 Copilot with custom agents.

badges.name: Copilot Developer Camp - MCP Integrator - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: The MCP Integrator badge recognizes developers who can design and implement agents that integrate seamlessly with external tools through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). This badge emphasizes secure integration patterns and real-world extensibility scenarios.

badges.name: Modern Search - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Modern Search badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - Modern Script community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: PnP PowerShell - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: 2026 PnP PowerShell badge earners contributed to PnP PowerShell in the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: Power Platform Samples - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Power Platform Samples badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community Power Platform Samples by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: Prompt Pro - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Prompt Pro badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - Copilot Prompt or Power Platform Prompt community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: Property Controls - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community Samples - Property Controls badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - Samples community by completing the contribution criteria below.

badges.name: React Controls - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community Samples - React Controls badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - Samples community by completing the contribution criteria below.

badges.name: Script Samples - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Script Sample badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - Script Samples community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: SharePoint 2026 Hackathon - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: SharePoint 2026 Hackathon badge earners submitted a solution for the Microsoft SharePoint 2026 Hackathon.

badges.name: SharePoint Skills - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: SharePoint Skills badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - SharePoint Skills community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: Sharing is Caring Contributor - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2025
badges.description: Sharing is Caring badge earners contributed to by attending and participating in at least one contribution-based Sharing is Caring session within the 2025 calendar year.

badges.name: Snippet Sorcerer - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Snippet Sorcerer badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - Power Platform Snippets or Script Samples community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: SPFx Adaptive Card Extensions - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: Adaptive Card Extensions badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - Adaptive Card Extensions community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: SPFx Toolkit - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: SPFx Toolkit badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - SPFx Toolkit community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: SPFx Web Part Samples - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community 2026
badges.description: SPFx Web Part Samples badge earners contributed to the Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community - SPFx Web Part Samples community by completing at least one of the contributions below.

badges.name: Springtime SuperStar 2026 - Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community
badges.description: Springtime SuperStar Community Contributor badge earners contributed to one or more Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community initiatives by completing at least one contribution to a Microsoft 365 & Power Platform Community initiative within the months of March, April or May in the 2026 calendar year.
